jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at AstraZeneca India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? AstraZeneca India in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About AstraZeneca India:
AstraZeneca India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AstraZeneca India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
